metadata.description: NeuralSeek plugins for Claude Code and Cowork. Install the NeuralSeek plugin to develop, debug, and operate mAIstro agents from inside Claude.

plugins.name: neuralseek-cowork-plugin
plugins.description: NeuralSeek integration for Cowork with interactive form-based setup. Credentials are collected via AskUserQuestion and written to ~/.neuralseek-cowork.json. Includes agent development (NTL), debugging, RAG search, architecture mapping, instance ops, and an agent template library.
